title: F(AI)²R: FAIR Research with AI in the Loop, Twice
description: Short-form working paper plus reproducible LLM-assisted writing pipeline (agent prompts, PROV-O provenance, build CI, static site). Manuscript, prompts, and the provenance graph are versioned together; the public site is at https://noheton.github.io/f-ai-r/.

creators.name: Krebs, Florian
creators.affiliation: DLR Zentrum für Leichtbauproduktionstechnologie (ZLP), Augsburg, Germany
